channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physical frailty linked to higher epilepsy risk
item.description: Physical frailty, especially slow walking speed, was independently associated with a significantly increased risk of developing epilepsy in a large study.

item.title: Wearable knee robot aids children with muscle weakness
item.description: A lightweight robotic device helps children with spinal muscular atrophy stand unassisted and supports neuromuscular recovery.

item.title: LinkedIn for physicians becomes essential by 2026
item.description: A physician without LinkedIn in 2026 risks business, reputation, and public health consequences, according to the article.

item.title: When the Defibrillator Stays in Its Box
item.description: After a teenage footballer died from cardiac arrest while a defibrillator remained unused, 13 organisations have until June to respond.
